name: gadget-chart
description: Mixed gadget package — a pure-SVG `Chart` bar-chart component plus a `useChartTheme` companion hook, behind one npm identity.

exports.description: Render a responsive SVG bar chart. Each datum is a labelled magnitude; bars scale to the largest value.
exports.usage: Render `<Chart data={[{ label, value }]} />` when the intent names a bar chart or a metric breakdown. Optional `height` (default 240) and `barColor` (any CSS color or `var(--…)`). The component owns the full SVG render — pass plain data, no refs.

example.componentSnippet: function RevenuePanel({ quarters }: Props) { return <Chart data={quarters.map((q) => ({ label: q.label, value: q.revenue }))} height={260} />; }

exports.gotchas: Pass `data` as plain `{ label, value }` objects from props — never hardcode chart values. Negative values clamp to a zero-height bar.

exports.description: Read the active ggui theme and return resolved chart colors — a categorical palette plus axis / label / grid colors.
exports.usage: Call `const theme = useChartTheme();` then pass `theme.palette[0]` to `<Chart barColor>` so the chart tracks the app theme. Takes no arguments.
